caption: A man with glasses wearing a dark shirt is visible in a small video call window in the upper right corner of a screen recording. The main area of the screen displays a complex conceptual map with various icons connected by blue curved lines on a dark background. Some of the icons feature green text labels such as "Healthy soils," "Healthy livestock," and "Healthy people." Other labels include "play," "Healthy food," and "Healthy crops." The top of the screen shows a web browser interface with multiple open tabs, including one titled "True Learning by Syr" and another "Moments by Systemic." The screen also displays text in the upper right like "Jerry Michidaki." Across the sequence of frames, the scene remains virtually static; the man in the video call remains in the same position with a consistent expression, and the conceptual map does not move or change, showing no active interaction with the interface.
